parameters.query:
WITH s AS (
  SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = $3 LIMIT 1
),
result AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT value FROM s) AS secret,
    CASE WHEN (SELECT value FROM s) IS NULL THEN NULL
         WHEN LOWER($5) = 'base64' THEN encode(hmac($1::text, (SELECT value FROM s), $4::text), 'base64')
         ELSE encode(hmac($1::text, (SELECT value FROM s), $4::text), 'hex')
    END AS expected
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN secret IS NULL THEN false
    WHEN expected IS NULL THEN false
    WHEN length($2) = 0 THEN false
    WHEN LOWER($5) = 'base64' THEN expected = $2
    ELSE LOWER(expected) = LOWER($2)
  END AS valid,
  CASE
    WHEN secret IS NULL THEN 'secret_not_found'
    WHEN length($2) = 0 THEN 'no_signature'
    WHEN length(expected) <> length($2) THEN 'length_mismatch'
    WHEN (LOWER($5) = 'base64' AND expected = $2) OR (LOWER($5) <> 'base64' AND LOWER(expected) = LOWER($2)) THEN 'ok'
    ELSE 'mismatch'
  END AS reason,
  COALESCE(LEFT(expected, 12) || '...', '(no_secret)') AS expected_preview,
  LEFT($2, 12) || (CASE WHEN length($2) > 12 THEN '...' ELSE '' END) AS given_preview,
  $4 AS algorithm,
  $5 AS encoding
FROM result;
